title: CG 2013
text: Home * Conferences * Computer and Games 2013 < Prev Next > Kyōsei-kan [1] The 8th International Computers and Games Conference , Keio University Kyōsei-kan , the Collaboration Complex [2] , Yokohama , Japan , August 13-15, 2013 . CG 2013 was held in conjunction with the WCCC 2013 , WCSC 2013 , and the 17th Computer Olympiad . Contents 1 Lectures 1.1 Day 1, August 13, 2013 1.2 Day 2, August 14, 2013 1.3 Day 3, August 15, 2013 2 Photos 3 See also 4 Publications 5 External Links 6 References Lectures [ edit ] [3] Day 1, August 13, 2013 [ edit ] Aja Huang , Martin Müller ( 2013 ).
